name: AWS Elastic Beanstalk Environment
description: Schema representing an AWS Elastic Beanstalk environment, which is a collection of AWS resources running an application version deployed on a specific platform.

ApplicationName.description: The name of the application associated with this environment.

VersionLabel.description: The application version deployed in this running environment.

SolutionStackName.description: The name of the SolutionStack deployed with this environment.

PlatformArn.description: The ARN of the platform version.

TemplateName.description: The name of the configuration template used to originally launch this environment.

EndpointURL.description: For load-balanced, autoscaling environments, the URL to the LoadBalancer.

CNAME.description: The URL to the CNAME for this environment.

DateCreated.description: The creation date for this environment.

DateUpdated.description: The last modified date for this environment.

Status.description: The current operational status of the environment.

AbortableOperationInProgress.description: Indicates if there is an in-progress environment configuration update or application version deployment that you can cancel.

Health.description: Describes the health status of the environment.

HealthStatus.description: Returns the health status of the application running in your environment.

Tier.description: Describes the current tier of this environment.

Name.description: The name of this environment tier.

Type.description: The type of this environment tier.

Version.description: The version of this environment tier.

Resources.description: The description of the AWS resources used by this environment.

Domain.description: The domain name of the LoadBalancer.

EnvironmentLinks.description: A list of links to other environments in the same group.

EnvironmentName.description: The name of the linked environment.

OperationsRole.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the environment's operations role.
